task:
Have exactly 4 tabs open, each loaded to a different URL, in this tab order:
- Tab 0: https://example.com
- Tab 1: https://httpbin.org
- Tab 2: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Internet
- Tab 3: https://www.w3.org

Tab 2 (the Wikipedia 'Internet' article) must be the active/focused tab when you finish.

verification.description: Tab with Wikipedia Internet article is open

verification.command: eval "len([t for t in result if t.get('active') and 'wikipedia.org/wiki/Internet' in t.get('url', '')])"
verification.eval: len([t for t in result if t.get('active') and 'wikipedia.org/wiki/Internet' in t.get('url', '')]) > 0
verification.description: Active tab is the Wikipedia Internet article (verified via tabs command)
